warnings: Confidence capped because the output identifies core SAP runtime behavior that is not SQL-convertible.
assumptions: Only translating the active (uncommented) INNER JOIN example as specified in the ABAP source
Commented out join examples (LEFT OUTER JOIN, RIGHT OUTER JOIN, CROSS JOIN) are not included in the translation
Table aliases _carr and _flsch_in are preserved as defined in the active code
conversion_notes: ABAP CDS DEFINE VIEW translated to SQL CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW
ABAP annotations @AccessControl and @EndUserText stripped as they have no SQL equivalent
ABAP table~column syntax (_carr.carrid) translated to SQL table.column syntax
ABAP 'key' keyword removed as it's not needed in SQL view definition
Only the uncommented INNER JOIN section was translated, following the literal translation rule
